propagation_mechanisms.inter_session: Master agent reads .context.yaml and work-process-log.yaml during activation.
propagation_mechanisms.inter_agent: Master uses run_subagent to inject prompt context; Specialists return text and mutate the filesystem.
propagation_mechanisms.cross_project: The _brain symlink allows external project directories to access central Matrix state.

serialization.locking: POSIX flock applied to system-errors.log.lock, preventing race conditions on error appending.
